title: Meloon's Realistic Thunder
description: This datapack upgrades weather in storms by bringing cozy delayed thunder to Minecraft
body:
## ⛈️ Meloon's Realistic Thunder!
---
**This extremely niche datapack upgrades weather in a storm by bringing cozy delayed thunder to Minecraft! (with no resource pack required!)**

---

This is a relatively light-weight datapack: it strictly adds delay and pitch alteration to the thunder sound effect based on the distance of the lightning strike from the player.

*No actual sound physics are simulated and the values are purely my estimations based on what sounded right to me.

*From my little testing, resource packs that change the thunder sound work to differing degrees, just try it out and see what works best. I find the vanilla sound to work well.

---
**This datapack should work just fine on multiplayer.**

---
Inspired heavily by **netcatgirl's** [ImmersiveThunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder/) mod
